comment: Seed roster for ITS_Subcontractors (ADR-0003, SC-S2). Extracted from the 05_Subcontracts corpus subcontract preambles (the authoritative legal-name source) across all 7 projects, canonicalized. Contact/email/phone/COI/license intentionally blank (filled later per the parked-COI decision). Consumed by scripts/migrations/seed_its_subcontractors.py (find-or-create by name, never overwrites operator edits).
state_note: The `state` field (2-letter USPS) is the subcontractor's PRIMARY job-site state as seen in the corpus — PROJECT-INFERRED, flagged for operator confirmation: West-region jobs → OR (Oregon), Midwest → IL (Illinois), East → MD (Maryland/Roxbury). A subcontractor working multiple states carries only the primary (single state per firm, mirroring the single vendor-region). This is the ITS_Subcontractors grouping/filter axis AND must be a valid governing-law jurisdiction (subcontracts.governing_law._STATE_NAMES).
operator_followups: Helm — SOW-only in the corpus (no subcontract preamble); legal suffix UNDETERMINED, needs the full legal entity.
Shumaker Electric, LLC — trade INFERRED (AC Electrical); no Exhibit A. Confirm AC vs DC.
Legacy Solar Systems — trade INFERRED (Mechanical); no Exhibit A. Confirm.
4 Seasons Construction LLC — state blank (Kendall CSP site state unresolvable). Set the USPS state before this subcontractor can group/render.
ALL states are project-inferred from job-site (West→OR, Midwest→IL, East→MD) — confirm each firm's true operating state; a correction on ITS_Subcontractors flows down to the portal via the §51 sync.
